issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.action: Keep breaker-first truth on hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, /lab, /execution/status, and current-state docs until recent 50 reaches at least 15 wins and streak falls below 50.

issues.title: q15 exact support remains 0/50 and stalled under breaker
issues.action: Keep support_route_verdict/support_progress/minimum_support_rows/gap_to_minimum visible in probe/API/UI/docs even when circuit_breaker_active is the primary blocker.

issues.title: bull|CAUTION spillover patch is productized, but must remain reference-only until exact support recovers
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; do not promote it from reference-only until current-live exact support reaches the minimum rows.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified
issues.action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: 連續 200 筆 1440m simulated_pyramid_win=0
issues.action: 檢查 recent canonical labels / regime breakdown / circuit breaker；必要時升級為 distribution-aware drift 調查

issues.title: recent canonical window 100 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=100, alerts=['constant_target', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0000, delta_vs_full=-0.6316, dominant_regime=bull(100.00%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0095, avg_quality=-0.2870, avg_dd_penalty=0.3869, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:29/56, frozen:1, compressed:28, expected_static:1, overlay_only:4, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:11, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-17 19:49:20.724170 -> 2026-04-18 00:29:49.821627, adverse_streak=100x0 since 2026-04-17 19:49:20.724170 -> 2026-04-18 00:29:49.821627, prev_win_rate=0.0, delta_vs_prev=0.0, prev_quality=-0.2829, quality_delta_vs_prev=-0.0041, prev_pnl=-0.0105, pnl_delta_vs_prev=0.001, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_vol_ratio(1.5378→0.2245,Δσ=2.3489)/feat_mind(0.036→-0.0002,Δσ=0.7342)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.1166→0.9042,Δσ=0.6602), frozen_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(0.0/1), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/100)/feat_claw_intensity(0.0026/19)/feat_scales_ssr(0.0027/53), expected_static_examples=feat_4h_ma_order[discrete_regime_feature], overlay_only_examples=feat_claw[research_sparse_source]/feat_claw_intensity[research_sparse_source]/feat_fang_pcr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(1/3)/feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0/0)/feat_chorus(0/0), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-17 22:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2981/2026-04-17 23:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2814/2026-04-18 00:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2895, adverse_examples=2026-04-17 22:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2981/2026-04-17 23:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2814/2026-04-18 00:29:49.821627:0:bull:-0.2895

issues.title: live predictor decision-quality contract is runtime-blocked by recent pathology, a toxic exact live lane, or a severe narrowed pathology lane
issues.action: 把 hb_predict_probe 納入每輪 heartbeat 驗證，對 exact live lane、當前 calibration scope 與 worst narrowed scope 做 root-cause drill-down；優先檢查 exact lane 是否仍是 ALLOW 但 canonical true-negative share 已偏高，並交叉比對 recent same-scope / narrowed-scope 4H shifts、scope selection、與 execution guardrail 是否只是正確地把壞 pocket 擋下。 live_scope=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label, regime=bull/BLOCK, label=D, sample_size=199, window=100, alerts=['constant_target'], expected_win_rate=0.0, expected_pnl=-0.01, expected_quality=-0.287, layers=0→0, top_shifts=feat_4h_dist_bb_lower(3.88→3.0501)/feat_4h_bb_pct_b(1.1183→0.9042)/feat_4h_dist_swing_low(5.4023→5.2472), exact_live_lane=(rows=199,wr=0.0,q=-0.2848,dd=0.3783,tuw=0.8446,recent500_dom=bull|BLOCK@1.0,targets=loss:199,true_negative_rows=199@1.0,final_gate=BLOCK:199), exact_lane_status=toxic_allow_lane, scope_matrix=regime_label+regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=199,wr=0.0,q=-0.2848,dd=0.3783,tuw=0.8446,alerts=['constant_target'],recent500_dominant=bull@1.0,recent500_gate_dominant=BLOCK@1.0,recent500_regime_gate_dominant=bull|BLOCK@1.0,recent500_regimes=bull:199,recent500_gates=BLOCK:199,recent500_regime_gates=bull|BLOCK:199; regime_gate+entry_quality_label:rows=199,wr=0.0,q=-0.2848,dd=0.3783,tuw=0.8446,alerts=['constant_target'],recent500_dominant=bull@1.0,recent500_gate_dominant=BLOCK@1.0,recent500_regime_gate_dominant=bull|BLOCK@1.0,recent500_regimes=bull:199,recent500_gates=BLOCK:199,recent500_regime_gates=bull|BLOCK:199;
